name: Botto

score_rationale.persistence: Operating since October 2021 (4+ years); survived bear market, maintained consistent output cadence. Strong 'Established,' approaching 'Institutional.'
score_rationale.autonomy: Clear human-in-the-loop: AI generates, DAO curates/votes. Meets 'Cyborg' anchor precisely. Cannot act without community approval.
score_rationale.cultural_impact: Christie's auctions, Art Basel exhibitions, mainstream press coverage. Between 'Niche Cult' and 'Canonical'—recognized by external institutions.
score_rationale.economic_reality: >$4M primary sales; controls treasury; financially autonomous. Definitive 'Market Mover.'
score_rationale.governance: Weekly DAO voting cycle, multisig treasury, transparent decision logs. Strong 'Constitutional' with some algorithmic elements.
score_rationale.tech_distinctiveness: Novel combination of generation + curation feedback loop, but built on standard models. Meets 'Integrated System' anchor.
score_rationale.narrative_coherence: Consistent identity as 'decentralized artist'; predictable aesthetic evolution. Strong 'Character' with emerging mythos around artistic evolution.
score_rationale.economic_infrastructure: DAO treasury from >$4M in primary art sales. Multisig-controlled funds. Weekly auction revenue cycle provides consistent economic activity. $BOTTO governance token. Revenue routing exists through DAO mechanisms. However, sales primarily through SuperRare and own auction — somewhat platform-dependent. Strong but not fully portable.
score_rationale.identity_sovereignty: On-chain presence through $BOTTO token on Ethereum. NFT collections provide provenance trail. DAO identity on-chain. No agent-specific identity standard (no ERC-8004). Identity is distributed across token, NFTs, and social media. Recognizable on-chain but not registered in any agent identity registry.

curator_notes: Botto represents the current gold standard for hybrid human-AI artistic production. While it lacks full autonomy (relying on a DAO for curation, hence the 6/10), it excels in economic reality and cultural persistence. It has successfully transitioned from a technical experiment to a recognized market participant in the fine art world, with works auctioned at Christie's and a self-sustaining treasury.

evidence.claim: CNBC reports Botto has generated millions of dollars in art sales as 'the AI machine artist'; profits split between $BOTTO DAO voters and on-chain treasury that funds compute. Mainstream business-press confirmation of market-mover scale.
Fortune (2023): >$3M primary sales in <2 years on the blockchain — establishes early economic-reality trajectory before the Sotheby's solo exhibition.
Sotheby's solo exhibition 'Exorbitant Stage: Botto, a Decentralized AI Artist' (Oct 2024) grossed $351,600 across six lots — third-party auction-house validation, not creator-controlled venue.
Christie's 'Augmented Intelligence' auction (Feb 2025) included Botto's NFT 'Siamese Cycle in Absurdism' alongside Refik Anadol and Holly Herndon — placement among the field's recognized leaders.
CNN coverage of Art Basel Hong Kong (Mar 2026) frames Botto as the headline AI-artist exhibitor — top-tier general-press recognition timed to the year's biggest art fair.
The Art Newspaper (Mar 2025) tracks Botto as a multi-year semi-autonomous AI artist with continuous exhibition and auction history since 2021 — confirms 4+ year operating window with no hard reset.
Sleek Magazine deep-dive on BottoDAO governance — ~5,000 token-holders, weekly proposal/voting cadence, transparent on-chain decisions. Third-party documentation of the constitutional structure.

NeurIPS 2022 Machine Learning for Creativity & Design workshop paper 'Botto: A Decentralized Autonomous Artist' — peer-reviewed venue documenting the generate→taste-filter→DAO-curate pipeline as a novel hybrid architecture.

Centre for Postdigital Cultures (Feb 2025) 'Is Botto's art any good?' — academic critical evaluation of Botto's artistic identity, indicating the persona is taken seriously enough by humanities researchers to merit aesthetic critique.

1kx Network analysis 'Botto: Art at the Intersection of AI and Token Networks' — third-party crypto-investor breakdown of $BOTTO token mechanics, revenue split (50% voters / 50% treasury), and weekly auction cycle. Industry validation of programmable-commerce layer.
Verse Works critical essay 'Generative Art Beyond Autonomy' analyzes Botto's hybrid human-AI agency — supports the Cyborg classification (AI generates, DAO curates) rather than fully sovereign.
